name: 数据可视化
description: 使用 matplotlib 和 seaborn 创建图表
script:
# 数据可视化示例
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')  # 非交互式后端
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import io
import base64

# 准备数据
data = inputs.get('data', [])
chart_type = inputs.get('chart_type', 'line')
title = inputs.get('title', 'Chart')

try:
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    
    # 设置图表样式
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
    sns.set_style('whitegrid')
    
    if chart_type == 'line':
        x_col = inputs.get('x', df.columns[0])
        y_col = inputs.get('y', df.columns[1])
        plt.plot(df[x_col], df[y_col], marker='o', linewidth=2)
        plt.xlabel(x_col)
        plt.ylabel(y_col)
    
    elif chart_type == 'bar':
        x_col = inputs.get('x', df.columns[0])
        y_col = inputs.get('y', df.columns[1])
        plt.bar(df[x_col], df[y_col])
        plt.xlabel(x_col)
        plt.ylabel(y_col)
        plt.xticks(rotation=45)
    
    elif chart_type == 'scatter':
        x_col = inputs.get('x', df.columns[0])
        y_col = inputs.get('y', df.columns[1])
        plt.scatter(df[x_col], df[y_col], alpha=0.6)
        plt.xlabel(x_col)
        plt.ylabel(y_col)
    
    elif chart_type == 'hist':
        col = inputs.get('column', df.columns[0])
        bins = inputs.get('bins', 20)
        plt.hist(df[col], bins=bins, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
        plt.xlabel(col)
        plt.ylabel('Frequency')
    
    plt.title(title)
    plt.tight_layout()
    
    # 保存为 PNG
    buffer = io.BytesIO()
    plt.savefig(buffer, format='png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.close()
    
    # 转换为 base64
    buffer.seek(0)
    image_base64 = base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
    outputs['chart'] = f'data:image/png;base64,{image_base64}'
    outputs['success'] = True
    
except Exception as e:
    outputs['error'] = str(e)
